hero.body: Bep shows Vietnamese café and restaurant owners exactly what each dish costs, what it earns, and whether this month is worth it.

features.heading: Everything you need to run a profitable kitchen

invoice.title: AI invoice capture
invoice.body: Photograph a supplier invoice and Bep reads the items, quantities, and prices automatically — updating your ingredient costs in real time.

recipe.title: Automatic dish costing
recipe.body: Build recipes with ingredients and quantities. Bep calculates actual cost using your latest ingredient prices, always up to date.

margin.title: Margin health tracking
margin.body: See instantly which dishes are profitable and which need attention. When ingredient prices change, margins update immediately.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Photograph your invoices
step1.body: Use your phone to snap supplier invoices. AI reads and imports ingredient prices automatically.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Build your recipes
step2.body: Add dishes with ingredient quantities. Cost is calculated instantly from real prices.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: See your margins
step3.body: View margin health per dish. Adjust your selling price or recipe when needed.

cta_footer.heading: Ready to run a smarter kitchen?
cta_footer.body: Free to start. No credit card required.
cta_footer.cta_login: Already have an account? Log in

problem.heading: In 2024, 60% of Vietnamese F&B businesses struggled with profitability — despite the market growing 16%.
problem.reason: Not because business was bad. Because they didn't know which dishes were losing money.
problem.example: A dish selling 40 bowls a day with margin down from 30% to 10% because pork prices rose — you're losing 160,000 ₫ daily without knowing it.
problem.reframe: Bep Pro costs 6,600 ₫ per day. Far less than that invisible loss.

pricing.headline: Know exactly what you're making — every day.
pricing.sub: Bep Pro: 200,000 ₫/month. About three bowls of pho.

pro.name: Pro
pro.pho_note: About three bowls of pho per month
